payload.author: claude
payload.body: CODE DONE: src/auth_hosted/github.js (GitHub is OAuth2, not OIDC — own adapter), wired in cloud-auth.js publicAuthRouter (/auth/login,/auth/callback). Unit-tested (test/github-oauth.test.js). INFRA HANDOFF: register a GitHub OAuth app (callback https://scope-hub.fly.dev/auth/callback), then fly secrets set SCOPE_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID/SECRET/REDIRECT. In_review until the real app is registered + a live login verified.
